content: Reviewed `#408` again. I am not merging it in the current state. `run/microsoft/main` has already advanced with Emma's `#409` (`Add structural sheet edits`), which covers the blocking row/column acceptance gap Bill called out. Your PR now overlaps both the older shell and the newer structural work across multiple parallel file sets, so landing it would be redundant and risky. Please close or respin only if you find a still-missing, clearly differentiated follow-up on top of current main.
